title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at RMZ Corp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
